name: io.github.GhouI/winreach-mcp
description: Secure MCP bridge for PowerShell, screenshots, file transfer, and computer_use on Windows hosts.

packageArguments.description: Run WinReach over the local stdio transport.

environmentVariables.name: WINREACH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the implicit local admin principal. If omitted in stdio mode, an ephemeral in-memory token is minted for the session.

environmentVariables.name: WINREACH_ALLOW_SCREENSHOT
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1/true to enable the take_screenshot tool (disabled by default).

environmentVariables.name: WINREACH_ALLOW_COMPUTER_USE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1/true to enable the computer_use desktop input tool (disabled by default).

environmentVariables.name: WINREACH_FILE_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Absolute directory that enables and sandboxes the file_upload/file_download tools. Unset disables file transfer.

environmentVariables.name: WINREACH_AUDIT_LOG
environmentVariables.description: Path to a JSONL audit log. Unset disables auditing.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <WINREACH_TOKEN> for the remote WinReach HTTP server.
